svg.text: Single-generator loops as trajectories, in every axis pair
28 own-pool runs; each is a path — one dot per training round, arrow to the next round. Coloured by judge.
Panel = column variable (x) vs row variable (y). No mixed-generator pools; no chosen axes.
each path is one run; a dot is a
training round, the arrow points to
kept − pool; drift Δv = value change.
